name.ja: ヒステリック・アイズ

requirement.en: When your opponent Normal Summons or Sets a monster from the hand, or when your opponent Special Summons a monster.

effect.en: Change the battle position of up to 2 monsters on your opponent's field. If you changed the battle position of a Ritual Monster by this effect, this turn, your opponent cannot activate the effects of monsters with the same original name as that Ritual Monster.
